text.text:
We are currently looking for 22 Junior Testers for an exciting long-term project based in Central Jakarta.

If you have 1–2 years of experience in testing, are familiar with IT systems, and enjoy working through structured test cases and scenarios, this could be a great opportunity for you.

Position: Junior Tester
📍 Location: Central Jakarta
📅 Start Date: Mid May 2026
⏳ Contract Duration: 12 Months (until Mid May 2027)
👥 Openings: 22 positions

What we’re looking for:
✅ 1–2 years of experience in software / system testing
✅Experience working with IT systems
✅Able to execute test cases and test scenarios
✅Comfortable recording actual test results accurately
✅Detail-oriented and able to follow existing test scripts
✅Basic understanding of test script creation is a plus (not mandatory)

Scope of work:
✅Test data will be provided
✅Test scripts are already prepared
✅Main responsibility is to execute test scripts, validate results, and document findings clearly
✅This is a great opportunity for junior testers looking to gain solid project experience in a structured testing environment.

📩 Interested or know someone who fits?
Please send your CV to bagas.wibisono@atreusg.com

Send with reference QAGUIDES
Please do not pay money, if any one ask for placement.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
I am not hiring person, I am sharing to help others.
If you do not want to miss daily updates on genuine job posts, you can follow/Connect me
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------
WhatsApp Job group for Scrum Master, Agile Coach, Technical Project Manager, PMO, Project Manager, Product Manager/BA/Testing/PMO/Operations/Java/.Net/AI/Power/Data Sci/BI/Automation/Data Science/Data Analytics/Power BI/Phyton/Machine learning

Here is the link:

https://lnkd.in/dcGpxERe

navigationContext.accessibilityText: View company: Barrow in Furnace jobs, Cumbria

text.text:
#hiring Joiner Non Local

Apply here: https://lnkd.in/gnfpszsx

Job Joiner  Location Barrow, United Kingdom Salary & Shifts Range of payrates based on shifts, full breakdown below   Introduction - Whats special about us? Our partner, BAE Systems, are seeking experienced Joiner to join their growing team in Barrow on a 12-month contract, offering competitive rates for both locals and those willing to commute from further afield. As part of a specialist team, youll be working on the latest generation of Submarines, Either Astute or Dreadnought Projects. If youre interested in learning more about this opportunity, click the apply button now, or read on to find out more.   What will I be doing? Fabricate, assemble, install, or repair wooden or composite items to standard including the use of fixed and portable woodworking machines. Pay rates BAE Systems offers a range of payrates for PAYE and Umbrella contractors, depending on your allocated shifts, and the distance youre travelling to reach the Barrow Site. Please see Below for Rates. The rates for Barrow if you are living more than 39 miles of the base.PAYE Matchtech  Barrow shift patterns Hourly RateHourly Holiday accrual or paid in advanceTotal hourly rate inclusive of holiday Standard shift 28.10 4 193 on 4 off  32.12 4 79Night shift  34.73 5 78Weekday & Saturday overtime  32.65

text.text:
Remote C2C Requirements Collaboration
Hello Connections,
We are actively looking to collaborate with recruiters and vendors who have daily C2C remote requirements with competitive budgets.
We currently have 1000+ experienced consultants available immediately across multiple technologies, including:
• Java
• .NET
• Microsoft Dynamics CRM
• Python
• Salesforce
• AI / Machine Learning
• React.js
• Angular
• React Native
• Data Architecture
• And many more technologies
All our consultants are highly skilled, experienced, and ready for remote contract opportunities.
If you have daily C2C remote requirements with a good budget, please feel free to connect and share the details. We would be happy to support your requirements with the right talent.
Looking forward to building long-term partnerships.

text.text:
🚀 Machine Learning Engineer (MLE Bench) – AI Evaluation Projects
🌍 Location: Remote
📍 Open to: 🇮🇳 🇵🇰 🇳🇬 🇰🇪 🇪🇬 🇬🇭 🇧🇩 🇹🇷 🇧🇷 🇲🇽
💼 Type: Contract (Freelance)
⏱ Commitment: 20+ hrs/week (PST overlap required)
📅 Duration: ~3 months (extendable)
🔥 This is where real ML engineering meets cutting-edge AI
You’ll be:
✔️ Working with production-level ML codebases
✔️ Building & modifying training, evaluation & inference pipelines
✔️ Preparing datasets, features & benchmarking metrics
✔️ Debugging and improving real-world ML systems
✔️ Evaluating model behavior, edge cases & failure modes
🎯 What they’re looking for:
3+ years as ML Engineer / ML-focused SWE
Strong Python for ML workflows
Hands-on with PyTorch / TensorFlow / JAX (or similar)
Experience with model training, evaluation & pipelines
Strong debugging & problem-solving skills
💡 Bonus if you’ve worked with:
LLMs | AI evaluation | benchmarking systems
🚀 Real talk:
If you want to work on how AI models are tested, improved, and pushed to production quality — this is a serious opportunity.
👉 Apply here: [https://lnkd.in/e4R9x2Z7]
